Project overview

What Prism is, what is available now, and which product principles shape the workspace.

Getting started

How to run Prism locally, where desktop distribution is headed, and what privacy defaults to expect.

Bot library and marketplace

How Prism organizes bots, previews personas and voices, exposes bot actions, and installs marketplace collections.

ConceptFor users

Free desktop distribution

Official Prism desktop builds are free; optional Patreon support is patronage, not product access.

Project essentials

No high-signal records captured yet.

Experience

Concepts to understand first

ConceptFor everyone

LOCAL mode privacy boundary

The LOCAL/ONLINE toggle is a hard privacy boundary: LOCAL turns must not silently leave the user's machine.

privacylocal-firstarchitecturehomepage
ConceptFor everyone

Product promise

Prism is a private-by-default, creative-by-design AI workspace for calm, multi-perspective thinking.

productoverviewhomepage
ConceptFor everyone

Experience lanes

Chat, Zen, Coffee, Sandbox, and Story are distinct lanes with different emotional weight and control surfaces.

uxfeatureshomepage
ConceptFor everyone

Bot library groups and marketplace installs

The Chat and Sandbox bot canvas can organize bots into saved groups and install marketplace bots, packs, starter bots, and Lenses with explicit...

uxbotsgroupsmarketplace
ConceptFor developers

Monorepo architecture

Prism is a Node.js, Next.js, Electron, SQLite, Qdrant, and Ollama workspace organized as apps plus shared packages.

architecturedx
ConceptFor developers

Memory and continuity pipeline

Prism stores scoped conversation state, encrypted memory records, and summary/search context while respecting incognito boundaries.

architecturedata-model

Rationale

Decisions that shaped the project

DecisionFor everyone

Keep LOCAL mode strict

Provider routing must honor LOCAL unconditionally, with tests pinning that selectProvider returns the local Ollama provider and embedding/auxiliary...

privacyarchitecture
DecisionFor everyone

Keep support non-gating

Official builds stay free to download and use.

distributionsupportproduct
DecisionFor everyone

Keep experience lanes separated

Chat, Zen, Coffee, and Sandbox stay separated by server guardrails and UI expectations.

uxarchitecture
DecisionFor developers

Adopt Wikiwiki for repo-local project knowledge

Install @thjodann/wk as a root dev dependency, initialize .wikiwiki with the mixed profile for all audiences, and use the wiki:* npm scripts for...

docstooling

Docs map

Agent-maintained record indexes

7 records Concepts

Durable explanations, domain terms, product ideas, and system concepts.

 4 records Decisions

Product, architecture, workflow, and implementation decisions with rationale.

 7 records Devlog

Meaningful changes and development milestones in chronological context.

 3 records Notes

Lightweight facts, reminders, and working context.

 4 records Symbols

Important code symbols and where maintainers should look first.
